iso3: # Compiled by the author from S&P Global Ratings' annual Sovereign Default
# press releases (1995-2024) and S&P's public sovereign archive at
# www.spglobal.com/ratings. Comments after '#' apply to the line above.
# Unrated countries (S&P does not maintain a rating) are marked NR and are
# excluded from numeric coding. Burkina Faso
# entered the S&P perimeter only from the dates indicated.
# Notch -> numeric map is in src/newperformers/io/ratings.py (NOTCH_TO_NUM).
# --- Singapore (AAA throughout the modern period; S&P upgraded SGP to AAA in 1995)
# --- China (BBB in mid-1990s; gradual upgrade to AA- by 2010; downgrade to A+ in 2017)
# --- Brazil (single-B in the 1990s; IG attained April 2008; lost September 2015)
# --- India (BB+ through 1990s; nuclear-test cut 1998; IG attained January 2007)
# --- Russia (1998 default; recovery to BBB+ by 2008; downgrade to BB+ April 2014; SD March 2022)

source_note: S&P withdrew the rating in mid-2022 after the SD event.
